raw_title: Toxicity and Moral Rhetoric in Video- and Text-Based Digital Platforms: A Multimethod Study of Political Talk Shows and News Articles in Taiwan
title_en: Toxicity and Moral Rhetoric in Video- and Text-Based Digital Platforms: A Multimethod Study of Political Talk Shows and News Articles in Taiwan
title_zh: 视频与文本数字平台中的毒性与道德修辞：台湾政治谈话节目与新闻文章的多方法研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了台湾数字平台上政治谈话节目和新闻文章中的毒性和道德修辞问题。研究人员使用多种方法分析视频和文本内容，了解这些平台如何影响政治讨论的质量和道德表达。
plain_summary_en: This study examines toxicity and moral rhetoric in political talk shows and news articles on digital platforms in Taiwan. Researchers use multiple methods to analyze video and text content, understanding how these platforms affect the quality of political discussion and moral expression.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于政治传播领域，关注数字媒体环境下政治话语的质量、道德表达和平台特性对公众讨论的影响。
research_direction_en: This research falls within political communication, focusing on the quality of political discourse, moral expression, and platform characteristics in digital media environments and their impact on public discussion.
